reasoning: Based on recent price data up to October 26, 2025, Solana (SOL) has been trading in the $190–$200 range throughout late October. Moving from current levels (~$195) to $350 would require an 80% price surge within a week. For an asset with Solana's market capitalization, an 80% increase in 5 days is extraordinarily unlikely outside of an unprecedented market shock or technical glitch. Due to system guidelines constraining probabilities to the [0.05, 0.95] range, I will assign the minimum possible probability of 0.05.
